lesson.subtitle: Aula 7 -- Colors and Clothes -- Adjectives + clothing
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Sandra Hayasaki | Aula 7 -- Colors and Clothes

listenings.text: Hi, I am Mark. Let me tell you about my clothes today. I am wearing a blue shirt and black pants. I love my blue shirt. It is my favorite. I also have a green jacket for cold days, and I am wearing black shoes. I do not wear a hat. My clothes are simple, but I like them. Blue is my favorite color.

Hello, my name is Lucy. Today I am wearing a red dress and white shoes. Red is my favorite color, so I have many red clothes. I also have a yellow skirt and a white t-shirt. I do not wear a jacket today because it is warm. I love bright colors. They make me happy.

extra_audio.text: Sandra opens her closet. First, she takes a red shirt. Then, she takes black pants. After that, she puts on white shoes. Finally, Mark says she looks beautiful.
